Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A young boy tragically drowns. Lifeguard Corey rescues Iggy who has swallowed a large amount of water.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 01

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards rescue a surfer being smashed against cliffs. Drunk Irishmen dance in tutus and frolic in the nude.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 05

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 09

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: New team members are thrown in the deep end. Boo and Lachie embark on a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 03

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 05

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: New trainee Ryan struggles with the megaphone. Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 01

Video.summary: Heidi Klum visits Bondi for a photoshoot. Harrison faces 3 drowning people. Surgery on a dislocated knee.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 07

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04
